title: New prop for <Calendar>, bug fix for <Button> and new logos

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- Corrected `size` prop in <Component>Calendar</Component> component, such that size `small` works in all [Calendar variants](https://vercel.com/geist/calendar#sizes).
- Corrected `shadow` prop for <Component>Button</Component>.

**New logos**

- Slack
- Contentful (color variant added)
- Supabase (logo only variant added)
- Braintrust
- Anthrophic
- Baseten

title: New <MultiSelect> component with advanced keyboard navigation, new logo, component removal

body.raw:
A new <Component>MultiSelect</Component> component with the following features:

- **Advanced keyboard navigation**: Up/down arrows navigate between rows while maintaining checkbox/button focus state
- **Left/Right arrow navigation**: Switch between checkbox and button focus within the current row
- **Tab**: Focus away from the menu (natural tab behavior)
- **Smart selection actions**: Context-aware actions (Select Only, Select All, Toggle) based on current selection state
- **Visual focus indicators**: Clear visual feedback for both mouse and keyboard interactions
- **Action labels**: Hover/focus labels that appear to show available actions
- **Full accessibility**: Proper ARIA labels, keyboard support, and screen reader compatibility

**New logos**

- orchids

**Removed components**

- Removes <Component>Capacity</Component> component.

title: Small bug fixes in Combobox and Modal

**Component updates**

- Alignment of the chevron icons is now harmonized across select-like components, such as <Component>Combobox</Component>.
- Disable `focusTrap` in <Component>Modal</Component> by default. This allows to click elements that have the same importance outside of the component, such as <Component>Toast</Component>.

**New logos**

- cua
- xata

**Icon updates**

title: New logos, <CodeBlock> improvements, and bug fixes

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- Add `bash` language support to <Component>CodeBlock</Component>
- Improve <Component>CodeBlock</Component> rendering with shadow DOM for better isolation
- Add theme awareness to <Component>CodeBlock</Component> shadow DOM styles
- Add inline script to prevent 1Password DOM interference with <Component>CodeBlock</Component>
- Update <Component>ContextCard</Component> placement logic for better positioning
- Fix keyboard directives in <Component>Keyboard</Component> component

**Bug fixes and improvements**

- Fix <Component>Sheet</Component> interaction with <Component>Toast</Component> components appearing simultaneously
- Remove invalid underline prop from DOM elements
- Fix impure CSS issues affecting component styles

**New logos**

- callaway-golf
- stanley-black-and-decker
- the-weather-company

title: New logos and icons, improved <ContextCard> positioning, and a bouquet of component refinements

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- Add `disabled` prop to <Component>ThemeSwitcher</Component> for disabling theme changes
- Improve <Component>ContextCard</Component> positioning logic with viewport constraint fixes and arrow offset clamping
- Add open delay to <Component>ContextCard</Component> to prevent accidental triggering on quick hovers
- Fix <Component>ContextCard</Component> Y-position always being constrained within viewport bounds
- Fix hydration flicker in <Component>ClearableInput</Component> and media query hook by wrapping state updates in `startTransition`
- Fix <Component>Combobox</Component> mobile layout alignment issues
- Increase contrast for <Component>Badge</Component> colors in dark mode
- Add stacked shadows from `<Material />` to `material-*` Tailwind utilities
- Fix spelling in <Component>ErrorCard</Component>: "occurred" instead of "occured"
- Fix `--font-sans` CSS variable not being defined in font exports
- Remove function wrapper around font classnames to prevent FOUT (Flash of Unstyled Text)
- Fix utils resolution for `cn` utility function

**New logos**

- vaimo
- autonoma
- vanta
- work-os
- corridor

**Logos updated**

- vaimo (visual update)

**New icons**

- bell-small
- sandbox

**New pixel icons**

- filesystem

**Pixel fonts**

- Add new Geist Pixel fonts (Circle, Grid, Line, Square, Triangle) with fallback CSS
- Temporarily disabled pixel font in Geist

title: New <Snippet> prop, <Calendar> keyboard shortcuts, and new logos

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- Add `copied` prop to <Component>Snippet</Component> for controlling the copied state externally
- Add `useContainer` prop to <Component>Grid</Component> for container query-based responsive layouts
- Add `/` keyboard shortcut to <Component>Calendar</Component> for shifting date ranges
- Compact <Component>Calendar</Component> padding for tighter layouts
- Add multiselect animation to <Component>Combobox</Component>
- Add icon transition to <Component>MultiSelect</Component> trigger
- Use small external icon in <Component>ButtonLink</Component> when set to `tab`
- Ensure Geist font is applied to standard form elements
- Fix <Component>Link</Component> underline, <Component>CodeBlock</Component> copy button, and <Component>Table</Component> striped row specificity
- Fix border in <Component>ContextCard</Component> indicator
- Fix <Component>Avatar</Component> rendering at exact requested size with inner border
- Fix mobile menu theme when forced theme is set
- Fix `Dialog.Content` requiring a `Dialog.Title`

**New icons**

- copy-prompt
- logo-xai

**New logos**

- avalara
- open-evidence
- sensay
- stably
- tapestry
- contentstack

**Logos updated**

- leonardo.ai (visual update)

**Other improvements**

- Add YAML and SQL as supported <Component>CodeBlock</Component> languages
- Re-add Geist Pixel fonts with improved opt-in setup
- Update `motion` from `12.23.5` to `12.35.0`

title: Color types and <Icon> updates

body.raw: We’ve introduced new global color types in Geist and updated the color prop for Icon to use them. The color prop now supports shorthand tokens like gray-900 and blue-700, replacing the longer var(--ds-gray-900) and var(--ds-blue-700). This improves readability, consistency, and developer experience with autocomplete. Strict color typing will be rolled out to more components in future updates. Learn more about the new color system at [geist/colors](https://vercel.com/geist/colors).

title: Button height harmonization, new language syntax highglight support and other small improvements

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- <Component>Button</Component> comes with a fix to prevent double firing of
  click events when the space key is used. Thanks
  [Damien](https://github.com/feugy) for spotting this!
- <Component>Button</Component> now has consistent height across all its
  variants and aligns with the Figma source of truth.
- <Component>CodeBlock</Component> now supports Lua for syntax highlighting.
  Thanks [Matthew](https://github.com/MatthewStanciu) for contributing!
- <Component>Collapse</Component> now opens the chevron icons from
  right-to-bottom instead of bottom-to-top to ensure consistency across our
  components. Thanks [Bryan](https://github.com/bmish) for contributing!

**Icon updates**

- Added missing sprite version to Trace icon

title: More <Calendar> styling options and highlight for <Fieldset>

body.raw:
The <Component>Calendar</Component> receives a `className` prop at the root level. This allows for more customization.

```tsx
<Calendar
  compact
  className="[&_[geist-combobox-calendar]]:w-full"
  maxValue={now}
/>
```

The <Component>Fieldset</Component> has a new `highlight` prop. Useful for highlighting a particular section when a user is redirected to it. Thank you [Konstantin](https://github.com/konst-git) for this addition.

**Bug fixes and improvements**

- Added statsig, hypertune, and growthbook as logo icons
- Fixed different input focus while typing when many inputs are in a <Component>Menu</Component>

title: Additional <CodeBlock> line highlights
Support linking to lines in <CodeBlock>

The <Component>CodeBlock</Component> component now supports linking to specific lines.

No changes to using the component, just press on a given line number and it will be added to the URL.

title: Consistent presence motion for components

body.raw:
Menu, ContextMenu,{' '} Combobox, CommandMenu, and{' '} Modal have been updated to adhere to our [new Guidelines](/geist/guidelines#surfaces-presence-motion) regarding when and how popovers and overlays should animate in and out:
There are several new Tailwind classes for animation: ```css /* Popovers */ .animate-fade-popover-out /* Overlays */ .animate-scale-overlay-in .animate-scale-overlay-out ``` The animations above make use of the following tokens which are useful for building bespoke keyframes: ```css /* Popovers */ --ds-motion-popover-timing --ds-motion-popover-duration /* Overlays */ --ds-motion-overlay-scale --ds-motion-overlay-timing --ds-motion-overlay-duration ``` Learn more by reading [Surfaces Presence Motion](/geist/guidelines#surfaces-presence-motion) under Guidelines.

title: Deprecation of Legacy Geist Icons

body.raw: We've officially deprecated the legacy icon system and removed it from Geist. This is a breaking change for projects still relying on legacy icons, requiring updates to the new system. All icons exported from Geist are now part of the updated set, featuring a streamlined API for Icon components, modernized color tokens (e.g., blue-500, gray-700), and consistent sizing rules. These changes are designed to improve the readability, maintainability, and developer experience of Geist. A comprehensive PR has already migrated all of [front](https://github.com/vercel/front) to the new icon system. However, any projects outside of [front](https://github.com/vercel/front) that depend on legacy icons must be updated before upgrading to this version of Geist. To explore the full set of available icons, visit [geist/icons](https://vercel.com/geist/icons).

title: Stabilized API calls to Figma, new prop for <Link>, deprecation notice for <Stack> and <Text>

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- <Component>Link</Component> now has an unset prop to reset the styles.

**Automation scripts updates**

- Stabalized API calls to Figma by splitting the source files into smaller parts.
- Simplified script commands:
  - `pnpm generate-logos`: fetches and generates only the logos.
  - `pnpm generate-icons`: fetches and generates only the icons.

**Deprecation notices**

The following components were deprecated due to having the wrong abstraction in the era of Tailwind CSS:

- <Component>Text</Component> replace with corresponding [Geist Tailwind CSS
  text utility](https://vercel.com/geist/typography) or [run
  codemod](https://github.com/vercel/front/pull/50434).
- <Component>Stack</Component> replace with plain Tailwind CSS or [run
  codemod](https://github.com/vercel/front/pull/49947).

title: <Gauge> Improvements

body.raw:
The <Component>Gauge</Component> component has been updated with proper WAI-ARIA attributes such as `role`. We now treat it as a `progressbar`. This makes sure screen readers announce the element as e.g. "80%, progressbar".

There's also a new `intermediate` prop on the component for when the progress state is missing.

title: Hello World

body.raw:
The Design Engineering team at Vercel is ramping up on introducing changes to make Geist more consistent and polished. In order for us to maintain a better understanding of the kind of changes being made to Geist, and the reasoning behind them, we are kicking off this changelog.

We expect several types of changes to be announced in the changelog:

- Component API modifications (e.g. renaming props, adding new props, removing stale props)
- Component deprecations with recommended alternatives
- Stale or unused component removals
- Net-new components or features

title: New Tailwind utility classes for Materials

body.raw:
We're introducing several new Tailwind classes to help with quickly setting a combination of commonly used surface styles according to our Geist Core Figma system. You can explore the full suite of available classes under [Materials](/geist/materials).

Make sure your application also extends `plugins` from the Geist `tailwind.config.js` file to leverage IntelliSense for the newly added classes.

title: Component Lifecycle Process & Directory Structure

body.raw: We've introduced a new component lifecycle process and directory structure to better organize components based on their development stage. Components are now organized across three directories: stable components in geist/components, experimental components in geist/components/experimental (with \_exp suffix), and deprecated components in geist/components/legacy (with \_legacy suffix). This structured approach improves component status visibility, prevents naming conflicts, and provides clear migration paths. The new documentation includes detailed processes for: - [Creating New Components](/geist/guidelines#creating-new-components) - [Refactoring Components](/geist/guidelines#refactoring-components) - [Deprecating Components](/geist/guidelines#deprecating-components) Learn more about the complete lifecycle process at [Component Lifecycle Process](/guidelines/process).

title: New <Browser> and <Phone> components

body.raw:
The <Component>Browser</Component> and <Component>Phone</Component> components let you showcase website screenshots or any other content within a realistic browser and phone-style frames.

<CodeBlock language="jsx">
  {`<Browser address="vercel.com">
  <Image alt="Vercel website screenshot" className="w-full block" fill src="..." />
</Browser>

<Phone address="vercel.com">
  <Image alt="Vercel website screenshot" className="w-full block" fill src="..." />
</Phone>`}
</CodeBlock>

title: Arbitrary key-value metadata for <Feedback>, bug fixes, and package housekeeping

body.raw:
**Component updates**

<Component>Feedback</Component> now supports arbitrary key-value metadata:

<CodeBlock language="jsx">
  {`<Feedback
  label="vercel"
  metadata={{
    serId: 'user_12345',
    location: 'post-checkout',
    orderId: 'order_123456',
  }}
/>`}
</CodeBlock>

**Bug fixes and housekeeping**

- Renamed utility exports from temporary to permanent paths:
  - `./tmp/utils` → `./utils`
  - `./tmp/utils/use-type` → `./utils/use-type`
- Fixed `cmdk` and `kbd` button visibility in <Component>SearchInput</Component> on small viewports.
- Improved skeleton in <Component>Calendar</Component>, such that it works with static shells.

title: Remove <Window>

body.raw:
We have moved the legacy <Component>Window</Component> component from Geist into [vercel-site](https://github.com/vercel/front/blob/main/apps/vercel-site/components/window/index.ts). The component was generally not being used except for a few older marketing pages.

Components specific to marketing can be found under [marketing-shared](https://github.com/vercel/front/tree/main/packages/marketing-shared), thus we recommend using <Component>Window</Component> from [marketing-shared](https://github.com/vercel/front/blob/ab62322c475feae3870e4ef7e0565ebec7a0f186/packages/marketing-shared/src/components/visuals/shared/window/index.tsx) going forward.

title: Small component updates

body.raw:
The <Component>Grid</Component> now properly destructures and handles `hideGuides` prop preventing it from being incorrectly passed to DOM nodes. Next, we added a cancel/clear button to the <Component>Calendar</Component>.
Lastly, the <Component>Codeblock</Component> now supports `Next.js` as a language.

title: New traces icon, destructive <MenuItem>, and updated design tokens

body.raw:
**Component updates**

- <Component>MenuItem</Component> now displays a red background when using the
  destructive variant.
- Added optional `external` prop to <Component>MenuLink</Component> and <Component>MenuItem</Component> to use the `ExternalSmall` icon and open in a new tab.
- Menu components can optionally use Radix Portal instead of Reach Portal.
- The <Component>Input</Component> component's prefix and suffix labels now properly use the `htmlFor` attribute with explicit IDs when provided.
- The <Component>Phone</Component> component includes variants and enhanced controls for better customization.
- Updated icon placement in the <Component>Note</Component> component.
- Refreshed <Component>EmptyState</Component> structure.
- The <Component>CopyButton</Component> now accepts a `style` prop.

**Icons**

- Fixed firewall icons display issues.
- Added new traces icon.

**Design Tokens**

- Updated border tokens across the design system for improved consistency.

**Dependencies**

- Removed the `ReactWrapBalancer` dependency.

title: New Tailwind variant classes for typography

body.raw:
We're introducing several new Tailwind classes to help with quickly setting a combination of typography styles (font size, font weight, line height, tracking) according to our Geist Core Figma system.

These classes are based on the `variant` prop of the <Component>Text</Component> component. Moving forward, we recommend using the Tailwind classes instead of the component. You can explore the full suite of available classes under [Typography](/geist/typography).

Make sure your application also extends `plugins` from the Geist `tailwind.config.js` file to leverage IntelliSense for the newly added classes.

title: Table Virtualization

body.raw:
The <Component>Table.Body</Component> component supports a new `virtualize` prop that optimizes rendering performance for large datasets by only rendering visible rows.

Visit [Table Documentation](https://vercel.com//geist/table#interactive-table) for a complete example.

```tsx
<Table.Body interactive virtualize>
  {/* Row content */}
</Table.Body>
```

We also extended the <Component>Feedback</Component> component to accept feedback for the flags-sdk site.
